# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for our application that needs to write logs and temporary files. Copy application files and set up directories for logs and cache. The container needs write permissions to these directories. Keep permissions flexible for ease of development and debugging.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18-alpine

# Create non-root user with specific UID/GID for consistency
RUN addgroup -g 1001 -S appgroup && \
    adduser -u 1001 -S appuser -G appgroup

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Create directories with specific ownership and minimal permissions
RUN mkdir -p /app/logs /app/cache /app/tmp && \
    chown -R appuser:appgroup /app

# Copy package files first for better layer caching
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup package*.json ./

# Switch to non-root user before installing dependencies
USER appuser

# Install dependencies
RUN npm ci --only=production && \
    npm cache clean --force

# Copy application files with proper ownership
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup . .

# Set restrictive permissions on application files (read/execute only)
USER root
RUN find /app -type f -not -path "/app/logs/*" -not -path "/app/cache/*" -not -path "/app/tmp/*" -exec chmod 440 {} \; && \
    find /app -type d -not -path "/app/logs" -not -path "/app/cache" -not -path "/app/tmp" -exec chmod 550 {} \; && \
    chmod 770 /app/logs /app/cache /app/tmp && \
    find /app/logs /app/cache /app/tmp -type f -exec chmod 660 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true

# Switch back to non-root user
USER appuser

# Set environment variables for writable directories
ENV LOG_DIR=/app/logs \
    CACHE_DIR=/app/cache \
    TEMP_DIR=/app/tmp \
    NODE_ENV=production

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD node -e "process.exit(0)" || exit 1

# Expose application port (adjust as needed)
EXPOSE 3000

# Run application
CMD ["node", "server.js"]
